lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello! You're not one of the hunters too, are you?

lines.speaker: Orsaga
lines.text: Oh no, but as someone that makes small soft versions of creatures, this is the place to be.

lines.speaker: Orsaga
lines.text: These books and the hunters' reports all contain lovely details about my subject matter. I might never leave!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd imagine this is the place to be for materials too. These hunters seem to find everything!

lines.speaker: Orsaga
lines.text: The cat is a great way to stress test some of the stitching too. He loves having something to play with!
